title: The Online Meeting
content: This morning, I joined an online meeting with my coworkers. Everyone connected from different locations. Before the meeting started, I checked my microphone and camera to make sure everything worked correctly. During the discussion, we talked about upcoming projects and shared ideas. Sometimes the connection was unstable, but we were still able to communicate effectively. I liked seeing everyone on the screen and hearing their opinions. Online meetings save time because people do not need to travel. They have become a normal part of modern work life.
